mapper.select: SELECT * FROM room_master rm WHERE rm.room_status = 'active' AND rm.room_no NOT IN (SELECT room_no FROM reservations WHERE status IN ('Reserved', 'In') AND checkin_date < #{checkoutDate} AND checkout_date > #{checkinDate});
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (member_name, member_phone, member_birth, reg_date, reservation_count, member_point) SELECT #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberBirth}, CURDATE(), 1, 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM members WHERE member_phone = #{memberPhone} AND member_name = #{memberName} AND member_birth = #{memberBirth});
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM members WHERE member_phone = #{memberPhone} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations (room_no, member_no, status, checkin_date, checkout_date, reg_people, add_option, pay_status, sms_status) VALUES (#{roomNo}, #{memberNo}, 'Reserved', #{checkinDate}, #{checkoutDate}, #{regPeople}, #{addOption}, 'Success', 'Success');

INSERT INTO reservations (room_no, member_no, status, checkin_date, checkout_date, reg_people, add_option, pay_status, sms_status) VALUES (#{roomNo}, #{memberNo}, 'Reserved', #{checkinDate}, #{checkoutDate}, #{regPeople}, #{addOption}, 'Waiting', 'Pending');
mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id FROM reservations WHERE idx = #{idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (reservation_id, pay_method, approval_no, room_price, point_amount, option_charge, total_charge, sms_status, pay_status, status_at) VALUES (#{reservationId}, #{payMethod}, #{approvalNo}, #{roomPrice}, #{pointAmount}, #{optionCharge}, #{totalCharge}, 'Success', 'Success', now())

insert into reservations (room_no, member_no, status, checkin_date, checkout_date, reg_people, add_option, pay_status, sms_status) values (#{roomNo}, #{memberNo}, 'Reserved', #{checkinDate}, #{checkoutDate}, #{regPeople}, #{addOption}, 'Waiting', 'Pending')
